positive: A majestic, stylized depiction of a forest creature merging with bioluminescent flora. The main subject is a sleek, mythical feline guardian composed of intertwined jungle vines and glowing, ethereal moss. It sits poised in a circular composition, rendered with sharp, graphic linework and deep contrast. The background is abstract and suggestive, using complementary cool blues, vibrant emerald greens, and touches of luminous cyan for glowing elements. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern vector illustration, perfect for screen printing on apparel. High detail, clean silhouettes, dynamic negative space.
